title: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 Out for 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester B.Com, LL.B, M.Sc, M.Com, MBA and MA Economics exams on the official website - smkvbastar.in on 09-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya result.

content.text: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya (SMKV), Bastar has officially released the SMKV Exam Result 2026 for various UG and PG semester examinations conducted for the 2025-2026 academic session. The latest result list on the SMKV result portal includes Bachelor of Commerce 1st Semester (Regular/Non-Collegiate and Backlog), Master of Science in Geology 3rd Semester, Master of Science in Chemistry 3rd Semester, Master of Laws 3rd Semester, Master of Commerce 1st Semester (Regular/Non-Collegiate and Backlog), Master of Business Administration 1st Semester (Regular and Backlog), Master of Arts in Economics 3rd Semester (Regular/Non-Collegiate), various LL.B 1st and 5th Semester Backlog/ATKT results, as well as old scheme M.Sc Physics and M.Com backlog results.

Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - smkvbastar.in. Students can check and download their UG and PG marksheets through the central result portal at smkvbastar.in/result.php or via the declared results interface at smkv.ucanapply.com by selecting session 2025-2026, programme type, course and semester, and then entering their roll number.

After viewing their SMKV result online, candidates must carefully verify their name, roll number, course, semester, subject-wise marks and overall result status. In case of any discrepancy or if they wish to apply for re-evaluation or re-totaling, they should contact the university or college examination cell and follow the instructions given on the result/revaluation portal.

sections.heading: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya has declared SMKV Exam Result 2026 for a wide range of UG and PG programmes including B.Com 1st Semester, LL.B 1st and 5th Semester, M.Sc (Geology, Chemistry, Physics Old), M.Com (New and Old), MBA 1st Semester and MA Economics 3rd Semester. These results cover Regular, Non-Collegiate, Backlog and ATKT categories, and are available on the SMKV Bastar result portal for the 2025-2026 session. Students can access their marksheets online using their roll number and course details.

rows: Bachelor of Commerce 1st Sem (Regular/Non-Collegiate & Backlog), Bachelor of Laws 1st & 5th Sem (Regular, Backlog, ATKT)

M.Sc Geology 3rd Sem, M.Sc Chemistry 3rd Sem, M.Sc Physics (Old) 1st & 4th Sem Backlog (ATKT), M.Com 1st Sem (Regular/Non-Collegiate & Backlog), M.Com (Old) 1st Sem Backlog (ATKT), MBA 1st Sem (Regular & Backlog), MA Economics 3rd Sem (Regular/Non-Collegiate)

sections.heading: Shaheed Mahendra Karma Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: SMKV has activated the online portals to check SMKV Exam Result 2026 for all recently declared UG and PG 1st, 3rd and 5th Semester examinations. Students can use the result portal link given below to access their respective course and semester result. After selecting the correct programme and semester, candidates can download their subject-wise marksheet by entering their roll number.

sections.heading: Steps to Check SMKV Exam Result 2026 Online

items: Go to the official SMKV result portal at https://smkvbastar.in/result.php.
Alternatively, you can open the central declared results page at https://smkv.ucanapply.com/declared-results.

On the result page: Select the Session as 2025-2026. Choose Programme Type (UG / PG) according to your course. Select your specific Programme (for example, B.Com, LL.B, M.Sc Geology, M.Sc Chemistry, M.Com, MBA, MA Economics, etc.). Select the relevant Semester (1st, 3rd, 5th, or old scheme semester as applicable).
Select the Session as 2025-2026.
Choose Programme Type (UG / PG) according to your course.
Select your specific Programme (for example, B.Com, LL.B, M.Sc Geology, M.Sc Chemistry, M.Com, MBA, MA Economics, etc.).
Select the relevant Semester (1st, 3rd, 5th, or old scheme semester as applicable).
Enter your Roll Number in the given field.
Click on the Search / View Result button to display your marksheet.
Check your name, roll number, course, semester, subject-wise marks and overall result status carefully.
Download or print the online marksheet for future reference and use it for revaluation or further academic processes if needed.
